Read More REQUEST APPOINTMENT / DETAILS Name Email Address Phone Number Message MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Name Email Address Phone Number Message FAQ 1. What is a multispeciality hospital? Multispecialty hospitals provide comprehensive healthcare services across a variety of medical specialties. A range of medical specialties and healthcare professionals are on staff at these hospitals. Multispecialty hospitals diagnose, treat, and manage a wide range of medical conditions and illnesses. 2. What is the difference between super-specialty and multispeciality hospitals? The difference between a multispecialty hospital and a super-specialty hospital is that super-specialists specialize in one specific area of medicine or surgery, while multispecialty hospitals cover a variety of medical specialties. 3. What are the types of insurance coverage provided by Mangal Prabhu Multispeciality Hospital in Navi Mumbai? To know insurance coverage details provided by Mangal Prabhu Hospital, please visit our TPA/Insurance coverage page. 4. What treatments options are available at Mangal Prabhu Multispeciality Hospital in Navi Mumbai? A leading multispecialty hospital in Juinagar, Navi Mumbai, the Mangal Prabhu Hospital is known for its advanced medical treatments. A variety of departments are located within the hospital, including General Surgery, General Medicine, Orthopedics, Urology, Dialysis Center, Chemotherapy Center, and ENT. 5. How to book an appointment at Mangal Prabhu Multispeciality Hospital? The Mangal Prabhu Hospital contact numbers are 02227711423 , 02227711451 , and for emergencies 8108199861 . Call the hospital to schedule an appointment.
